import React from 'react'; import { T } from '../constants/tokens'; const LessonsPage = ({ setPage }) => { const go = (id) => { setPage(id); window.scrollTo(0,0); }; const phrases = [ { yoruba: "Ẹ káàárọ̀", english: "Good morning" }, { yoruba: "Ẹ káàsán", english: "Good afternoon" }, { yoruba: "Ẹ kúlẹ́ o", english: "Welcome home" }, { yoruba: "Ẹ kú iṣẹ́", english: "Well done for your work" }, { yoruba: "Nibo lo n lo?", english: "Where are you going?" }, { yoruba: "Ki lo fe je?", english: "What would you like to eat?" }, ]; const names = [ { name: "Ayọ̀délé", meaning: "Joy has come home" }, { name: "Olúwáfẹ́mi", meaning: "God loves me" }, { name: "Adéọlá", meaning: "The crown of wealth" }, ]; return (
{/* Hero banner */}
Learn Yoruba

Connect with Your Heritage.
Build Cultural Confidence.

We offer structured, engaging, and culturally rich Yoruba lessons designed specifically for the diaspora experience.

{/* Classes */}
Our Classes

Structured Learning for Every Stage

{/* Children */}
For Children

The Yoruba Language Circle

A fun, interactive virtual space where children aged 5-15 learn Yoruba through songs, stories, games, and conversation.

  • Small group sizes for maximum engagement
  • Age-appropriate curriculum
  • Focus on speaking and listening confidence
  • Term-based progression
Enrol Your Child →
{/* Adults */}
For Adults

Yoruba for Adults

Tailored for beginners and returners who want to reclaim their heritage language or support their children's learning.

  • Flexible online membership
  • Practical conversational focus
  • Supportive community of learners
  • Resources for home practice
Explore Adult Classes →
{/* Common Phrases */}
A Taste of Yoruba

Common Phrases & Greetings

{phrases.map(p => (
{p.yoruba}
{p.english}
))}
Yoruba Names

Names That Carry Meaning

Yoruba names are living poetry — each one tells a story about the child, the family, and the moment they arrived.

{names.map(n => (
{n.name}
{n.meaning}
))}
{/* CTA */}

Your First Lesson Starts with a Conversation

Book a free discovery call to find the right class for you or your child.

Enrol Now →
); }; export default LessonsPage;
